name: Corn Muffins (Majors)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Add lightly beaten egg, milk, and butter to the dry mixture.
3. Stir until just combined; avoid overmixing to prevent air tunnels and pointed tops.
4. Fill prepared muffin tins (lined with cupcake liners) about 2/3 full with batter.
5. Bake for 20 minutes at 400°F.
Food Exchanges: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE; CAL: 95
